description_long: This is a two-part wooden cabinet system featuring a combination of closed and open storage spaces. The left section has a set of vertically aligned doors with a wood grain finish and subtle metallic trim, topped by a light-colored countertop with a cutout. The right section is more open, revealing multiple shelves and compartments, including a large open cubby and several smaller shelves, ideal for organizing various items. The cabinet stands on small, discrete legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall design is modern and functional, with a mix of enclosed and accessible storage. The materials and construction suggest it is suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or utility rooms.
description: A modern two-part wooden cabinet system with both closed doors and open shelving, featuring a light countertop and metallic trim. It offers a mix of enclosed and open storage, suitable for urban utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the closed wood-grain doors on the left section and open shelving with compartments on the right.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the countertop cutout and the depth of the open shelving units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of both cabinet sections and the overall rectangular structure.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the closed doors and the open shelving, emphasizing the cabinet's dual functionality.
